explanation: The user states that the mug is dirty and needs to be cleaned first. Currently, the mug is picked up and dirty. To clean it, I must first place it in the sink basin to access the water. I then turn on the faucet to ensure water is flowing. After that, I pick up the mug again to ensure it is properly handled during cleaning. Finally, I place it back in the sink basin to complete the cleaning process. This sequence ensures the mug is cleaned as instructed.
